title: Cobblemon Stellar Blue
description: A datapack for the Cobblemon mod that adds fabled Pokémon of the Lumora Region made by yours truly, Kenji_64, to your game!
body:
# **The Fakemon of the Lumora Region are coming to Cobblemon!**

![Stellotl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd77e0a5352211b50d5253c5581fbd227a03f1fb.png)

With this addon I created I'm planning to add as many of my Fakemon as possible to it for everyone to play with in their Minecraft Cobblemon worlds. The first release of this pack only added **the legendary Pokémon Stellotl** to the game. It's fully animated, has a move pool, cry and can even sit on your shoulder!

A lot of Fakemon are in the works as this is a relatively new project. If you'd like to learn more about them, I suggest you to check out the dedicated Fakemon thread in the Cobblemon Discord Server or join the Cobblemon Stellar Blue Discord Server.

Without further ado: Enjoy the Pokémon of the Lumora Region!


I also added a starter.json file for you, that allows you to pick one of the three starters of the Lumora Region when starting a new adventure! You simply have to set the factor exportstarterconfig in .minecraft/config/cobblemon/main.json to true and insert the file in .minecraft/config/cobblemon <--- (from Cobblemon 1.7 onwards this is obsolete)

### How to play with the Stellar Blue addon:

1. Download the .zip file for the addon
2. Insert the file in both your resourcepacks and the datapacks folder of your world. Make sure to activate the resourcepacks or else all of the Pokémon will be substitutes!
3. Have fun!

![Cobblemon Stellar Blue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4ff21ef90871f6a0d289d07b958b028122f524b_0.webp)

DISCLAIMER: You are free to use this pack in your singleplayer world or private server with friends, but please **do NOT use it for public community servers.** If you spot any public server using this pack, that is not listed here, report it immediately. Thank you.
# 
Credits: Every model, if not specifically listed, is modeled, animated and textured by Kenji_64.
A huge shoutout to Pandahm_ for making (if not specifically listed otherwise) every cry for this addon.
A huge thank you goes to my friends, who work with on our addons, that inspire me and motivate me to make my Fakemon, especially to BlueZulfish, TealiBean and Jerzyk, who are of great help in the balancing department.

And of course a huge thank you to you, the player! Without an awesome community like you I would have never made it this far. Thank you for playing my addon!
# 

![Starters](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/006b5ec674338c7a64276c2af08847885e75f30c.png)

Depending on the item it holds when receiving the Moon Stone, Dusbun evolves into a Jackalune with 8 different possible purely cosmetic flavors:
- Standard > Vanilla
- Pecha Berry > Peach
- Cocoa Beans > Choco
- Medicinal Powder > Matcha
- Wiki Berry > Taro
- Pink Petals > Sakura
- Mago Berry > Mango
- Berry Juice > Soda

<details>
<summary>Stellar Forms</summary>
Stellar Forms are special cosmetic variants of Pokémon, that all follow the starry theme of the Lumora Region!

  
**Starstruck Pattern Magikarp**

![Magikarp Starstruck](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efa78cc127efdbd2f1119f8d30795d2eb1ed06b8.png)

Obtainable via: Fishing during Full Moon with a Pokérod enchanted with Lure I+

Specialty: evolves into Starstruck Pattern Gyarados
#

Obtainable via: Give Spewpa a Nether Star at Level 10

Specialty: learns Dazzling Gleam

</details>
